description: Pure data-model addition. Add Option<u32> callsite_sid / body_sid / resolved_sid fields to Term::Call, Term::TailCall, Term::TailCallClosure, Term::CallClosure, Prim::MakeClosure. Default None. Compile fixers (constructors). No behavior change. All tests green.
title: fz-aiz.3a: add annotation fields to IR Term/Prim variants
